regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 escalation continues with massive Israeli strikes on April 7-8 killing IRGC intelligence chief Khademi and petrochemical infrastructure (tens of billions in damage), triggering Iranian regional attacks and 'Operation Crushing Revenge' vows while diplomatic channels show contradictory signals—Trump claims productive talks with a 5-day energy strike pause, yet Iran's parliament denies negotiations and hardline consolidation under new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and SNSC chief Zolghadr accelerates amid regime repression and public exhaustion.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli airstrikes on April 7-8 killed IRGC intelligence chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi and targeted Iran's largest petrochemical facilities, causing tens of billions in economic damage and triggering Iranian regional attacks across UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Jordan alongside 'Operation Crushing Revenge' vows.
